faqs.question: What are the most common pantry pests in Annadale homes?
faqs.answer: The most common pantry pests in Annadale include Indian meal moths, cigarette beetles, sawtoothed grain beetles, flour beetles, and weevils. These pests infest dry goods like flour, cereal, pasta, rice, nuts, dried fruits, and pet food. They can quickly spread throughout your pantry if not addressed promptly.

This includes inspection, treatment of infested areas, removal recommendations, and follow-up prevention advice to ensure the pests don't return.
